coordinates.x: float -1.0 to 1.0 — current position on X axis
coordinates.y: float -1.0 to 1.0 — current position on Y axis
coordinates.x_axis_label: string — name of X axis e.g. 'Solitude ← → Social'
coordinates.y_axis_label: string — name of Y axis e.g. 'Heavy ← → Dreaming'
coordinates.quadrant_label: string — named zone e.g. 'The Heavy Corner'
coordinates.quadrant_description: string — 1 line flavour text for this zone

movement.movement_label: string | null — e.g. 'drifting further left since last week'
movement.movement_direction: enum: deeper | recovering | stable | shifting | null

population.total_users_on_map: integer — anonymised total for density layer
population.same_quadrant_count: integer — users in same quadrant this period
population.percentile: integer — what % of users are 'above' (higher y) — for copy generation
population.density_grid: array of {x, y, weight} — for rendering heatmap, can be null for v1

copy.headline: string — e.g. 'You're in the corner again.'
copy.position_copy: string — describes where they are in plain language
copy.movement_copy: string | null — describes the drift if applicable
copy.population_copy: string | null — e.g. '23% of listeners are here with you'

visual.show_trajectory_line: boolean — draw line from prev to current
